description: Treating a generator expression as a configure-time string makes a per-configuration condition evaluate wrong, applying flags to the wrong build type.
body: Failure mode: a conditional meant to apply only in Debug compares CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE as a plain string during configure, but with multi-config generators the build type is unknown until generate time. Detection signals: debug-only flags appear in release builds or vice versa; the condition behaves differently between single- and multi-config generators. Do not branch on CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE for per-config flags. Safer fallback: express per-configuration logic with a generator expression like $<CONFIG:Debug> and verify the emitted flags per configuration with file(GENERATE).
